mapper.select: SELECT cart_item_id, user_id, product_id, quantity, selected_color, selected_size, add_time, update_time FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY add_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items ( user_id, product_id, selected_color, selected_size, quantity, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{selectedColor}, #{selectedSize}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT cart_item_id, user_id, product_id, selected_color, selected_size, quantity, add_time, update_time FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND ( (selected_color IS NULL AND #{selectedColor} IS NULL) OR (selected_color = #{selectedColor}) ) AND ( (selected_size IS NULL AND #{selectedSize} IS NULL) OR (selected_size = #{selectedSize}) ) LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET quantity = #{quantity}, selected_color = #{selectedColor}, selected_size = #{selectedSize}, update_time = NOW() WHERE cart_item_id = #{cartItemId}
mapper.select: SELECT cart_item_id, user_id, product_id, quantity, selected_color, selected_size, add_time, update_time FROM cart_items WHERE cart_item_id = #{cartItemId}
